zh.lifeSummary: 當Deacon Samuel Wheelock於1664年1月21日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德時，他的父親Gershom Wheelock32歲，母親Hannah Stoddard27歲。他於1692年與Lydia Rice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1740年12月10日之後在美國麻薩諸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Deacon Samuel Wheelock于1664年1月21日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德时，他的父亲Gershom Wheelock32岁，母亲Hannah Stoddard27岁。他于1692年与Lydia Rice在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1740年12月10日之后在美国马萨诸塞州伍斯特史福斯波利，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Wheelock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place so named in Cheshire. The placename is derived from the river Wheelock; the river name means ‘winding river’, from British Suilāco-.

nameMeanings.name: Samuel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (Hebrew Shemuel), possibly meaning ‘He (God) has hearkened’ (presumably to the prayers of a mother for a son). It may also be understood as a contracted form of Hebrew sha'ulme'el meaning ‘asked of God’. In the case of Samuel the son of Hannah, this would be more in keeping with his mother's statement ‘Because I have asked him of the Lord’ (1 Samuel 1:20). Living in the 11th century bc , Samuel was a Hebrew judge and prophet of the greatest historical importance, who established the Hebrew monarchy, anointing as king both Saul and, later, David. In the Authorized Version two books of the Old Testament are named after him, although in Roman Catholic and Orthodox versions of the Bible they are known as the first and second Book of Kings. The story of Samuel being called by God while still a child serving in the house of Eli the priest (1 Samuel 3) is of great vividness and has moved countless generations. In England and America the name was particularly popular among the 16th-century Puritans and among Nonconformists from the 17th to the 19th century. It became fashionable again in the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Deacon Samuel Wheelock was born on 21 January 1664, in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Gershom Wheelock, was 32 and his mother, Hannah Stoddard, was 27. He married Lydia Rice in 1692, in Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died after 10 December 1740, in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, United States, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Deacon Samuel Wheelock est né le 21 janvier 1664, à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Gershom Wheelock, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Hannah Stoddard, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lydia Rice en 1692, à Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé après 10 décembre 1740, à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, États-Unis, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Deacon Samuel Wheelock am 21. Januar 1664 in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gershom Wheelock 32 und seine Mutter Hannah Stoddard 27. Er hat 1692 in Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Lydia Rice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb nach 10. Dezember 1740 in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Deacon Samuel Wheelock è nato il il 21 gennaio 1664 nel Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Gershom Wheelock, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Stoddard, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lydia Rice nel 1692, nel Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì dopo il 10 dicembre 1740, nel Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Deacon Samuel Wheelockが1664年1月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドで生まれた時，父Gershom Wheelockは32歳，母Hannah Stoddardは27歳であった。1692年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルルボロウでLydia Riceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1740年12月10日以後にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ウオルセスターシュリュースブリーで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 슈레w스버이
ko.Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드
ko.lifeSummary: Deacon Samuel Wheelock(이)가 1664년 1월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gershom Wheelock(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Stoddard(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1692년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 말를버루그h에서 Lydia Rice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1740년 12월 10일 이후 미국 매사추세츠 주 워스스터 슈레w스버이에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Deacon Samuel Wheelock nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1664, em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Gershom Wheelock, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Stoddard, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lydia Rice em 1692, em Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu após 10 de dezembro de 1740, em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Deacon Samuel Wheelock родился 21 января 1664 г. в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Gershom Wheelock было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Hannah Stoddard, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Rice в 1692 г. в местности марлбороую, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер после 10 декабрь 1740 г. в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Deacon Samuel Wheelock nació el 21 de enero de 1664, en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Gershom Wheelock, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Hannah Stoddard, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lydia Rice en 1692, en Marlborough, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió después de 10 de diciembre de 1740, en Shrewsbury, Worcester, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
